info.name: Atlassian Get Inline Tasks Based on Search Parameters

params.name: start
params.description: The starting offset for the results.

params.name: limit
params.description: The number of results to be returned.

params.name: spaceKey
params.description: The space key of a space. Multiple space keys can be specified.

params.name: pageId
params.description: The page id of a page. Multiple page ids can be specified.

params.name: assignee
params.description: Account ID of a user to whom a task is assigned. Multiple users can be specified.

params.name: creator
params.description: Account ID of a user to who created a task. Multiple users can be specified.

params.name: completedUser
params.description: Account ID of a user who completed a task. Multiple users can be specified.

params.name: duedateFrom
params.description: Start of date range based on due dates (inclusive).

params.name: duedateTo
params.description: End of date range based on due dates (inclusive).

params.name: createdateFrom
params.description: Start of date range based on create dates (inclusive).

params.name: createdateTo
params.description: End of date range based on create dates (inclusive).

params.name: completedateFrom
params.description: Start of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).

params.name: completedateTo
params.description: End of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).

items.docs:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns inline tasks based on the search query.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission). Only tasks
in contents that the user has permission to view are returned.

info.name: Atlassian Get Inline Task Based on Global Id

params.name: inlineTaskId
params.description: Global ID of the inline task

items.docs:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns inline task based on the global ID.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to view the content associated with the task.

info.name: Atlassian Update Inline Task Given Global Id

params.name: inlineTaskId
params.description: Global ID of the inline task to update

items.docs:
Updates an inline tasks status given its global ID

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to update the content associated with the task.
